broker_node_group_info.description: Configuration block for the broker nodes, including instance type, storage, and AZ distribution settings.
broker_node_group_info.type: list(object({az_distribution: optional(string),client_subnets: list(string),instance_type: string,security_groups: list(string),connectivity_info: list(object({public_access: list(object({type: optional(string)})),vpc_connectivity: list(object({client_authentication: list(object({tls: optional(bool),sasl: list(object({iam: optional(bool),scram: optional(bool)}))}))}))})),storage_info: list(object({ebs_storage_info: list(object({volume_size: optional(number),provisioned_throughput: list(object({enabled: optional(bool),volume_throughput: optional(number)}))}))}))}))

client_authentication.description: Defines the method for client authentication, such as TLS, SASL, or both, to ensure secure communication with the Kafka cluster.
client_authentication.type: list(object({unauthenticated: optional(bool),sasl: list(object({iam: optional(bool),scram: optional(bool)})),tls: list(object({certificate_authority_arns: optional(list(string))}))}))

cluster_name.description: Name of the Amazon MSK cluster, must be unique within the AWS account and region.

configuration_info.description: Defines the Amazon MSK cluster configuration to use, specifying the ARN and revision of the configuration.

encryption_info.description: Defines the encryption settings for the MSK cluster, including encryption at rest and in transit.

enhanced_monitoring.description: Specifies the level of monitoring for the MSK cluster, such as DEFAULT, PER_BROKER, or PER_TOPIC_PER_BROKER.

kafka_version.description: Specifies the version of Kafka to be used for the MSK cluster. Must be a supported Kafka version.

logging_info.description: Configuration for broker logging, specifying the type and details of logs to be enabled for the Amazon MSK cluster.
logging_info.type: list(object({broker_logs: list(object({cloudwatch_logs: list(object({enabled: bool,log_group: optional(string)})),firehose: list(object({delivery_stream: optional(string),enabled: bool})),s3: list(object({bucket: optional(string),enabled: bool,prefix: optional(string)}))}))}))

number_of_broker_nodes.description: Specifies the number of broker nodes in the MSK cluster; must be a positive integer and meet the cluster's availability requirements.

open_monitoring.description: Configures the open monitoring settings for the MSK cluster, allowing integration with third-party monitoring systems; requires specifying Prometheus settings.
open_monitoring.type: list(object({prometheus: list(object({jmx_exporter: list(object({enabled_in_broker: bool})),node_exporter: list(object({enabled_in_broker: bool}))}))}))

storage_mode.description: Defines the storage mode for the MSK cluster, such as "EBS" for storage backed by Amazon Elastic Block Store.

tags.description: Key-value pairs to associate with the MSK cluster for identification and organization; must comply with AWS tagging requirements.

timeouts.description: Defines the duration for create, update, and delete operations on the MSK cluster. Use ISO 8601 format for specifying time periods.
